common_side_effects: Upset stomach (more common with NSAIDs), nausea.
serious_side_effects_red_flags: Severe stomach pain, black stools, trouble breathing, facial swelling.
interaction_warnings_general: Avoid combining with similar pain relievers unless advised. NSAIDs can affect kidneys and stomach lining.
